# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: http_listener
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/users"
                route:
                  cluster: user_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/products"
                route:
                  cluster: product_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/orders"
                route:
                  cluster: order_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/payments"
                route:
                  cluster: payment_service
                  timeout: 60s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/inventory"
                route:
                  cluster: inventory_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/health"
                route:
                  cluster: health_check_service
                  timeout: 5s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: default_service
                  timeout: 30s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: user_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 299
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: user_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: user-service.internal
                port_value: 8080
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 60s
    http2_protocol_options:
      max_concurrent_streams: 100

  - name: product_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: LEAST_REQUEST
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 299
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: product_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: product-service.internal
                port_value: 8081
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 60s

  - name: order_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 500
        max_pending_requests: 500
        max_requests: 500
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 15s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /actuator/health
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 299
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: order_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: order-service.internal
                port_value: 8082
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 120s

  - name: payment_service
    connect_timeout: 10s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 200
        max_pending_requests: 200
        max_requests: 200
        max_retries: 2
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 10s
      interval: 20s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 299
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: payment_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: payment-service.internal
                port_value: 8083
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 180s

  - name: inventory_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 800
        max_pending_requests: 800
        max_requests: 800
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:

      interval: 10s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 299
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: inventory_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: inventory-service.internal
                port_value: 8084
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 60s

  - name: health_check_service
    connect_timeout: 2s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: health_check_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: localhost
                port_value: 8090

  - name: default_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 500
        max_pending_requests: 500
        max_requests: 500
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:

        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 299

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
